name: acadify
description: LMS platform with course management, lectures, and student progress tracking

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix "[{name}]" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan" "bun --cwd server run dev" "bun --cwd client run dev"
scripts.build: bun --cwd server run build && bun --cwd client run build
scripts.install:all: bun install && bun --cwd client install && bun --cwd server install
